---
title: "Weekly Training Load Summary"
output:
  pdf_document:
    df_print: default
    latex_engine: xelatex
geometry: "letterpaper,margin=0.5in"
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{titling}
  - \setlength{\droptitle}{-60pt}
  - \pretitle{\begin{center}\small}
  - \posttitle{\end{center}\vspace{-10pt}}
params:
  report_start: !r as.Date("2025-02-03")
  report_end:   !r as.Date("2025-02-09")
  gps_all:      NULL
  week_data:    NULL
  wellness:     NULL
---


```{r date_line, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
cat(sprintf(
  "\\vspace*{-3.5cm}\n\\begin{center}\\small %s -- %s\\end{center}\n\n",
  format(params$report_start, "%b %d, %Y"),
  format(params$report_end,   "%b %d, %Y")
))

```

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Setup Chunk
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, error = FALSE)

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lubridate)
library(tidyr)

theme_set(theme_minimal(base_family = "Helvetica"))

# Parameters from script
report_start <- params$report_start
report_end   <- params$report_end
gps_all      <- params$gps_all
gps_week     <- params$week_data
wellness     <- params$wellness

# Daily GPS up to report_end
gps_daily <- gps_all %>%
  filter(Date <= report_end, !is.na(Date)) %>%
  arrange(Date)

# Weekly wellness subset
wellness_week <- wellness %>%
  filter(
    Date >= report_start,
    Date <= report_end,
    !is.na(Name),
    !is.na(Wellness)
  )

# Team average wellness for the week
team_wellness_week <- wellness_week %>%
  summarise(
    Fatigue  = mean(Fatigue,  na.rm = TRUE),
    Soreness = mean(Soreness, na.rm = TRUE),
    Stress   = mean(Stress,   na.rm = TRUE),
    SQ       = mean(SQ,       na.rm = TRUE),
    Mood     = mean(Mood,     na.rm = TRUE)
  )

# Long-format wellness for plotting
team_wellness_long <- team_wellness_week %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = everything(),
    names_to = "Variable",
    values_to = "AvgScore"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Variable = factor(
      Variable,
      levels = c("Fatigue", "Soreness", "Stress", "SQ", "Mood"),
      labels = c("Fatigue", "Soreness", "Stress", "Sleep Quality", "Mood")
    )
  )

```

```{r distance, echo=FALSE}
# Create Distance Plot
stopifnot("TD" %in% names(gps_week))

avg_data <- gps_week %>%
  group_by(Name) %>%
  summarise(AvgTD = mean(.data[["TD"]], na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

TD_plot <- ggplot(avg_data, aes(x = Name, y = AvgTD)) +
  geom_col(fill = "black", alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(AvgTD / 1000, 1))), vjust = -0.3, size = 3) +
  labs(title = "Average Weekly Distance", x = NULL, y = "Average Distance (km)") +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 0.5, size = 7),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 0, r = 5, b = 0, l = 5),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0, colour = "grey30"))

```

```{r monotony, echo=FALSE}
# Create Monotony Plot
monot_col <- "TD_Monotony"
stopifnot(monot_col %in% names(gps_daily))

daily_monot <- gps_daily %>%
  group_by(Date) %>%
  summarise(
    Monotony = mean(.data[[monot_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups  = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Monotony)) %>%
  arrange(Date)

monot_plot <- ggplot(daily_monot, aes(x = Date, y = Monotony)) +
  geom_line(color = "#000000", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Monotony), size = 1) +
  scale_color_gradient(low = "grey60", high = "#B71C1C") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "#E3B506") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 2.0, linetype = "dashed", color = "#B71C1C") +
  labs(
    title = "Team Monotony",
    x     = NULL,
    y     = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_family = "Helvetica") +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin     = margin(t = 0, r = 5, b = 2, l = 5),
    plot.title      = element_text(hjust = 0, color = "grey30"),
    legend.text     = element_text(color = "grey30")
  )

```

```{r acwr, echo=FALSE}
# Create ACWR Plot
acwr_col <- "ACWR"
stopifnot(acwr_col %in% names(gps_daily))

daily_acwr <- gps_daily %>%
  group_by(Date) %>%
  summarise(
    ACWR    = mean(.data[[acwr_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(ACWR)) %>%
  arrange(Date)

acwr_plot <- ggplot(daily_acwr, aes(x = Date, y = ACWR)) +
  geom_line(color = "#000000", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(aes(color = ACWR), size = 1) +
  scale_color_gradientn(
    colours = c("#B71C1C", "#238B45", "#E3B506", "#B71C1C")
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.8, linetype = "dashed", color = "#B71C1C") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1.3, linetype = "dashed", color = "#E3B506") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "#B71C1C") +
  labs(
    title = "Team ACWR",
    x     = NULL,
    y     = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_family = "Helvetica") +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin     = margin(t = 0, r = 5, b = 2, l = 5),
    plot.title      = element_text(hjust = 0, color = "grey30"),
    legend.text     = element_text(color = "grey30")
  )

```

```{r wellness, echo=FALSE}
# Create Overall Wellness Plot
stopifnot(all(c("Name", "Wellness") %in% names(wellness_week)))

wellness_avg <- wellness_week %>%
  group_by(Name) %>%
  summarise(
    AvgWellness = mean(Wellness, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups     = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    ColorCat = case_when(
      AvgWellness < 13 ~ "Low",
      AvgWellness < 17 ~ "Moderate",
      TRUE             ~ "High"
    )
  )

wellness_plot <- ggplot(wellness_avg, aes(x = AvgWellness, y = Name, fill = ColorCat)) +
  geom_col(alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(AvgWellness, 1)),
            hjust = -0.2, size = 3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Low"      = "#B71C1C",
    "Moderate" = "#E3B506",
    "High"     = "#238B45"
  )) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 25),
                     breaks = seq(0, 25, by = 5)) +
  labs(
    title = "Average Overall Wellness",
    x     = NULL,
    y     = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.y     = element_text(size = 10),
    plot.margin     = margin(t = 0, r = 10, b = 0, l = 5),
    plot.title      = element_text(hjust = 0, colour = "grey30")
  )

```


```{r team_subscore_wellness, echo=FALSE}
# Create Individual Wellness Score Plot
cols <- rep("#FB8C00", 5)
names(cols) <- c("Fatigue", "Soreness", "Stress", "Sleep Quality", "Mood")

wellscore_plot <- ggplot(team_wellness_long,
                         aes(x = Variable, y = AvgScore, fill = Variable)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(AvgScore, 1)),
            vjust = -0.3, size = 3) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 5), breaks = 0:5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cols) +
  labs(
    title = "Average Wellness Scores",
    x     = NULL,
    y     = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x    = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.margin    = margin(t = 0, r = 10, b = 0, l = 5),
    plot.title     = element_text(hjust = 0, colour = "grey30"),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

```


```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
# Push the whole block down 
cat("\\vspace*{0.5cm}\n")
```


```{r build_combined, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Build Plot Grids for .pdf
library(ggpubr)

row1 <- ggarrange(TD_plot, ncol = 1, nrow = 1)

row2 <- ggarrange(monot_plot, acwr_plot, ncol = 2, nrow = 1)

row3 <- ggarrange(wellness_plot, wellscore_plot, ncol = 2, nrow = 1)

combined <- ggarrange(
  row1,
  row2,
  row3,
  ncol = 1, nrow = 3,
  heights = c(1.1, 1.3, 1)  
)

```


```{r save_combined, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
ggsave(
  filename = "combined_plot.pdf",
  plot     = combined,
  width    = 7.5,   
  height   = 10,    
  units    = "in"
)
```


```{r include_combined, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
cat('
\\vspace*{-0.3cm}
\\begin{center}
\\includegraphics[width=\\textwidth,height=0.95\\textheight,keepaspectratio]{combined_plot.pdf}
\\end{center}
')
```
